datasets.name: 42e5cf60
queryLines:
SELECT item_name,
  sum(item_quantity) as total_quantity_sold
FROM ws_dbxproject.`02_silver`.fact_order_items
where order_date BETWEEN :DATE_RANGE.min AND :DATE_RANGE.max 
GROUP BY item_name
ORDER BY total_quantity_sold DESC
LIMIT 10

datasets.name: a32809c0
queryLines:
SELECT * FROM ws_dbxproject.`02_silver`.fact_order_items
where order_date BETWEEN :DATE_RANGE.min AND :DATE_RANGE.max

datasets.name: a30d5469
queryLines:
SELECT d.name as restaurant_name, 
    date(r.review_timestamp) as review_date, 
    Count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN r.sentiment = 'positive' THEN r.review_id END) as positive_review_count,
    Count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN r.sentiment = 'negative' THEN r.review_id END) as negative_review_count,
    Count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN r.sentiment = 'neutral' THEN r.review_id END) as neutral_review_count
FROM ws_dbxproject.`02_silver`.fact_reviews r
join ws_dbxproject.`02_silver`.dim_restaurants d 
ON r.restaurant_id = d.restaurant_id 
group by 1,2
ORDER BY 1, 2

datasets.name: 22c20f6c
queryLines:
SELECT restaurant_name, rating_label, rating_count
 FROM ws_dbxproject.`03_gold`.restaurant_reviews
LATERAL VIEW STACK (

    5,
    '5 Star', total_5_stars,
    '4 Star', total_4_stars,
    '3 Star', total_3_stars,
    '2 Star', total_2_stars,
    '1 Star', total_1_stars

) as rating_label, rating_count

datasets.name: f34aca59
queryLines:
SELECT 
r.name as restaurant_name, 
count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN f.issue_delivery = 'true' THEN f.order_id END) as delivery_issues,
count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN f.issue_food_quality = 'true' THEN f.order_id END) as food_quality_issues,
count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN f.issue_pricing = 'true' THEN f.order_id END) as pricing_issues,
count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN f.issue_portion_size = 'true' THEN f.order_id END) as portion_size_issues
FROM ws_dbxproject.`02_silver`.fact_reviews f
JOIN ws_dbxproject.`02_silver`.dim_restaurants r
ON f.restaurant_id = r.restaurant_id
GROUP by restaurant_name

datasets.name: d04ec2f9
queryLines:
SELECT 
r.name AS restaurant_name,
fr.review_text, 
fr.review_timestamp
  FROM ws_dbxproject.`02_silver`.fact_reviews fr
join ws_dbxproject.`02_silver`.dim_restaurants r
on fr.restaurant_id = r.restaurant_id
where fr.sentiment = 'negative' and fr.review_text is not null ;

datasets.name: 1d57239e
queryLines:
SELECT 
r.name AS restaurant_name,
fr.review_text, 
fr.review_timestamp
  FROM ws_dbxproject.`02_silver`.fact_reviews fr
join ws_dbxproject.`02_silver`.dim_restaurants r
on fr.restaurant_id = r.restaurant_id
where fr.sentiment = 'positive' and fr.review_text is not null ;

frame.title: Order Volumne By Day of Weak
